description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build. Add a build_latest job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, executes "docker build --pull -t kilik/mysql-filter-dump:latest ." then "docker push kilik/mysql-filter-dump:latest". Add a build_tagged job in the build stage that runs only on tags, executes "docker build --pull -t kilik/mysql-filter-dump:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ." then "docker push kilik/mysql-filter-dump:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". Include a before_script that logs in to the registry with "docker login -u $CI_JOB_USER -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN".
